snippet.description:
“STEEL BALL RUN JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure” 2nd STAGE premieres on Netflix in 2026.

In the 2nd STAGE, the racers must cross a 750-mile expanse of desert.
In 1875, a threat lurking in the desert called the “Devil’s Palm” wiped out a cavalry of 26 people, eliciting fear from the local native people.
Johnny Joestar and Gyro Zeppeli embark on a long and rigorous race.

snippet.title: Calling All Villains - Announcement Trailer
snippet.description:
Calling All Villains is a 3D animated sci-fi/action/comedy series produced and creatively helmed by ZAMination, starring Mr. Puzzles--originally from SMG4.

This isn’t a direct continuation of SMG4. Set years later, the series follows Mr. Puzzles as he’s evolved--for better or worse... roping him into all-new adventures with a brand new cast of characters. Haven't seen SMG4? No problem! Calling All Villains is built as a fresh starting point, so you can jump right in and enjoy the ride. And for longtime fans, there are plenty of hidden nods and juicy Easter eggs waiting for you... 

With full blessing from SMG4, we've been given the rights to continue Mr. Puzzles’ story and bring this series to life. The pilot episode is currently in production, with the full release planned for later this year. More updates are coming soon, so remember... 

STAY TUNED...

snippet.title: Hesham - mish malayh هشام اليمني - مش مليح الدلع  |  2026
snippet.description:

https://linktr.ee/hesham_alyamani

Hesham - mish malayh

هشام اليمني  - مش مليح الدلع ( حصرياً ) | 2026


  كلمات | عبدالخالق الصيت
  الحان | سهيل اليمن
توزيع وميكس وماستر | علاء الحرضي
تسجيل | محسن الحسني ( أوتار جده ) 

إشراف فني 
أ.  عمار الشيخ 
اسامة الحرضي

شكر خاص :
مارسيل طارش
ملاطف حميدي

إخراج | نبيل الآنسي

—————————

الكلمات : 

تعالي خلاص مش مليح الدلع..
لمَو مشتجيش عنّو من قد منع..
ولاجيتي عندي قولي مو شُقع.. 
اشنجلس قليل بس مع بعضنا..

تعالي وانا افدى المليح الشُّفيق..
قصف عمر كل من شسيبك لضيق..
يبي يوم سمعتو ان قدِك بالطريق..
قُليبي جنن كيف لشافِك هنا..

لمو ساعة اليوم متمشيش سوا..
تعاند حبيب ضاق عنده الهوا..
يراعي لِخِلّو الذي هو الدوا..
متى شجني زرعه قد الكل جنا..

لمو ساعة اليوم متمشيش سريع..
الو وين قدِك.. عاادني.. مو سريع..
صحيتو من النوم ووضعي شُنيع..
حتى المنام ما جمع بيننـــا...

تعالي لنا والا شاجي انا..
تعالي وزورينا لبيتنا..
تعالي وقضّي المسا عندنا..
شنهدر ششوفك ونسمر لنا..

تعالي انا واعذابي انا..
تعالي بدونك اذوق العنا..
تعالي وربي افتقدتُ الهنا..
متى اشترجعي وشنجس وحدنا..


#هشام_اليمني #مش_مليح_الدلع

لام ربي كل من هو لامني 
هايمٍ في وجهك وفي مُجملِك 

خلنا نرجع سوا لا تردني 
ليت ألاقي حلّ واقدر أوصلك

snippet.title: Harmonize - Wewe (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
In Swahili, “Wewe” means “You.” And in this record, “You” is not just a word it’s a choice, a declaration, and a promise.

“Wewe” is a deeply personal love confession from Harmonize to the woman who holds his heart. Built on S2Kizzy’s warm, emotional production, the song feels intimate like a private conversation turned into music. It’s not just a love song; it’s a man openly choosing his partner in front of the world.

With the line “wewe ndo unanipendeza, dunia inajua,” Harmonize makes his feelings public and unapologetic. He celebrates her beauty, her presence, and the peace she brings into his life. There’s maturity in his words “mimi mwenyewe najipongeza, najua kuchagua” as he appreciates finding someone genuine in a world often driven by money and appearances.

The song also reflects growth. He acknowledges past distractions and people who were only interested in wealth “kumbe walitaka pesa nikawapa moyo.” It’s a vulnerable admission of giving his heart to the wrong places, only to realize that real love was always with “wewe.” Through jealousy, outside pressure, and life’s ups and downs, he makes it clear that their bond keeps rising like the sun after every storm.

The repeated plea “ni bora ningekupa wewe tu upendo, muda wangu…” carries both regret and devotion. It’s the sound of a man who now understands the value of giving his time, loyalty, and full attention to one woman.

“Wewe” captures Harmonize at his most sincere  romantic, reflective, and emotionally open. It’s a royal dedication to true love, reminding listeners that genuine connection will always outweigh money, fame, or fleeting attention.
